title: Sweet Ride
excerpt: 2012 was full of adventure. And plane rides. To combat boredom on recent flights, I've taken my Ready Set Go Travel Kit with me. In a way, I feel like I have also taken all of you fellow blog readers…
body:
2012 was full of adventure. And plane rides.

To combat boredom on recent flights, I've taken my Ready Set Go Travel Kit with me. In a way, I feel like I have also taken all of you fellow blog readers as well. Thanks for allowing me to serve up a slice of all the random bits of life here and for commenting when you do. Looking forward to sharing more adventures with you in 2013! Thanks for coming along for the ride.
